description: Vulnerable Bash is a 2 cost Basic Attack Card for the Ironclad.

Defend (Ironclad) is a 1 cost Basic Skill Card for the Ironclad. It gives 5 (8 if upgraded) Block. This page is for the Ironclad version of Defend. Other characters' respective versions can be found at Defend (Silent), Defend (Regent), Defend (Necrobinder), and Defend (Defect).

Strike (Ironclad) is a 1 cost Basic Attack Card for the Ironclad. It deals 6 (9 if upgraded) damage. This page is for the Ironclad version of Strike. Other characters' respective versions can be found at Strike (Silent), Strike (Regent), Strike (Necrobinder), and Strike (Defect).

Infernal Blade is a 1 (0 if upgraded) cost Uncommon Skill Card for the Ironclad. It generates a random Attack card, which remains free to play until it is played, or the end of turn. Despite the wording of free to play this turn, once the generated Attack has been played once, it will have resume its original cost, and will not be free anymore. Infernal Blade can only generate Attacks found in the given character's native card pool, and is not affected by or .

Weak is a both players and enemies can apply to their targets. While available to all characters, the Silent has the some dedicated support for . While a character or enemy has , the damage of their Attack cards or enemy is decreased by 25% (typically), then rounded down. At the end of its turn, one point of is decremented from the player or enemy.

Upgrading a card improves its effects or decreases its cost, adds a + to the end of its name, and turns its name as well as the cost, if it was lowered as a result of Upgrading it. A card can only be upgraded once and all Status and Curse cards cannot be upgraded.

As such Forbidden Grimoire can not be used to remove itself.
